response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior individual contributor with well over 8 years of development experience and credible developer-tooling work (a D test runner, assertion library, CI/CD setups, MCP code generators). However, this is a Level II Engineering Manager role requiring at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing or leading people, owning team roadmaps, conducting one-on-ones, or performance management. The mobile-platform exposure is minor and dated (iOS/Apple TV ~2015-2016). The profile fits a senior/staff IC opening, not a people-leadership position.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance backends
Genuine developer-tooling and testing infrastructure work: test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD, MCP generators
Strong craftsmanship and mentoring signals (TDD, workshops, dojos, teaching courses)
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or formal team-leadership experience (core requirement)
No evidence of owning team priorities, performance expectations, or technical roadmaps
Mobile-platform experience is limited and several years out of date
